description: The Romeo 'ndrina, also known as Stacchi, is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in San Luca, Italy. It is allied with the Nirta (La Maggiore) and Pelle clans. The clan has been involved in international drug trafficking, money laundering, and other criminal activities, with operations spanning Italy, the Netherlands, Germany, Belgium, Colombia, and Brazil. Several members have been arrested in major operations such as Puerto Liberado and European 'ndrangheta connection.

country_links.context: The organization is involved in international drug trafficking between Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, Italy, Colombia, and Brazil.
